notableEvents.label: Ryan O'Hearn GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ryan O'Hearn grounds into a double play, first baseman Gavin Sheets to shortstop Xander Bogaerts to pitcher Michael King. Bryan Reynolds out at 2nd. Ryan O'Hearn out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Ryan O'Hearn rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ryan O'Hearn grounds into a double play, first baseman Gavin Sheets to shortstop Xander Bogaerts to pitcher Michael King. Bryan Reynolds out at 2nd. Ryan O'Hearn out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Spencer Horwitz GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Padres challenged (tag play), call on the field was overturned: Spencer Horwitz grounds into a double play, first baseman Gavin Sheets to shortstop Xander Bogaerts. Nick Yorke out at 2nd. Spencer Horwitz out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Xander Bogaerts reaches on a throwing error by shortstop Nick Gonzales.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Xander Bogaerts reaches on a throwing error by shortstop Nick Gonzales.

notableEvents.label: Konnor Griffin pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Konnor Griffin out on a sacrifice fly to left fielder Ramón Laureano. Nick Yorke scores.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Nick Castellanos reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Konnor Griffin.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Jackson Merrill reaches on a fielder's choice. Ramón Laureano scores. Fernando Tatis Jr. to 3rd. Throwing error by first baseman Nick Yorke.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Jackson Merrill reaches on a fielder's choice. Ramón Laureano scores. Fernando Tatis Jr. to 3rd. Throwing error by first baseman Nick Yorke.

notableEvents.label: Xander Bogaerts reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Xander Bogaerts reaches on a throwing error by shortstop Nick Gonzales.

notableEvents.label: Nick Castellanos reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Nick Castellanos reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Konnor Griffin.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Jackson Merrill reaches on a fielder's choice. Ramón Laureano scores. Fernando Tatis Jr. to 3rd. Throwing error by first baseman Nick Yorke.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Jackson Merrill steals (2) 2nd base. Fernando Tatis Jr. steals (3) home.
